title: plectranthus dregei
intro: Plectranthus dregei, also known as the Mountain Sage or Cape Mountain Sage, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Plectranthus dregei include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Plectranthus dregei can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
